chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 605 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.4138/2025 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on MA No.4139/2025 (R/Surety) 24.09.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali A. Soomro, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 2. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Muhammad Ali, who on 03.09.2024, was granted protective bail for a period of five days, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing one original special savings certificate of such amount, has surrendered before the learned trial Court within prescribed period and obtained interim pre-arrest bail on 05.09.2024, which has subsequently been confirmed on 10.09.2024, as is evident from the orders of even dates, annexed with the application. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
